{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ame‑no‑Morohano‑Mikoto Shrine (Q135198847)
| native_name = 天諸羽命神社
| mapframe = yes

| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ame‑no‑Morohano‑Mikoto Shrine'''|天諸羽命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11458212|ltq=Q11458212|qid=Q11458212|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tsushima}}
** Series ordinal: 4
** P155: {{ill|Q135041528|ltq=Q135041528|qid=Q135041528|1=Noritono Shrine (Q135041528)}}
** P156: {{ill|Amanotakutsutamano- Shrine|lt=Amanotakutsutamano- Shrine|qid=Q135041530|1=Amanotakutsutamano- Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q52048|ltq=Q52048|qid=Q52048|1=Tsushima}}
* {{ill|Kamiagata district|lt=Kamiagata district|ja|上県郡|ko|가미아가타군|zh|上縣郡|qid=Q10868208|1=Kamiagata district}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 183361
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== P14005 (P14005) ==

* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* -モロハノ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135041529|ltq=Q135041529|qid=Q135041529|1=Amenomorohanomikoto Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
